text: The Action Bar at the top of the Inspector provides quick access to core tools. Hover over them to see what they do! The plus adds a node, the sparkles run auto-arrange.
Now let us select a node to inspect it. Click the root node in the center of your screen.
onEnter: SC.hideRadialMenu(true); if(SC.kernel.state.nodes.length === 0) { SC.kernel.addNode({title: 'Tutorial Node'}); } const node = SC.kernel.state.nodes[0]; SC.kernel.state.session.viewport.x = window.innerWidth/2; SC.kernel.state.session.viewport.y = window.innerHeight/2; SC.render(); if(window._tutInt) clearInterval(window._tutInt); window._tutInt = setInterval(() => { if(SC.dom && SC.dom.radialMenu && SC.dom.radialMenu.classList.contains('active')) { clearInterval(window._tutInt); window.Tutorials.nextStep(false); } }, 200);

text: Clicking a node brings up the Radial Menu. The buttons around the node let you Trigger special actions, Create Children, Link to other nodes, or Delete them.
When a node is selected, its details appear in the Inspector. Here you can edit its Name, Content, and Type.
Clicking anywhere on the background will close the radial menu and deselect the node.
